tool.name: Recount3
tool.description: retrieves harmonized gene expression data from TCGA and GTEx

param.name: data_source
param.label: Data source
param.help: Select a TCGA cancer type or a GTEx normal tissue.
param.option: TCGA - Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (HNSC)
TCGA - Kidney Renal Clear Cell Carcinoma (KIRC)
TCGA - Kidney Renal Papillary Cell Carcinoma (KIRP)

param.name: tissue_type
param.label: Tissue type (TCGA only; ignored for GTEx)
param.help: Restrict TCGA samples to tumor, adjacent normal, or both. Has no effect on GTEx.

param.name: normalize
param.label: Output TPM-normalized counts?
param.help: Raw integer counts are always produced. Enable this only when you also need TPM values for WGCNA or visualization.

tool.help:
Recount3 ================
Downloads recount3 gene-level RNA-seq data for a selected TCGA project or GTEx tissue.
Outputs =======
Raw counts Integer counts for differential expression tools such as DESeq2, edgeR, and limma-voom.
TPM-normalized counts Optional TPM matrix for WGCNA or visualization.
Sample annotation Sample metadata from ``colData(rse)``. TCGA sample IDs are changed from UUIDs to TCGA barcodes when available.
Gene annotation Gene metadata from ``rowData(rse)`` using GENCODE v29.
Notes =====
The tissue-type filter applies only to TCGA. GTEx projects are normal tissue, so the filter is ignored. Do not use TPM-normalized values as input to differential expression tools.
